help.wasmUnsupported: Voice dictation not supported: this browser does not support WebAssembly.
help.lanChromium: Chromium blocks the mic on HTTP over an IP: the padlock icon does nothing here. Use localhost, HTTPS, or the Chrome flag below.
help.lanFirefox: Firefox: set media.devices.insecure.enabled AND media.getusermedia.insecure.enabled to true in about:config, then reload.
help.lanGeneric: Mic blocked on HTTP: switch to localhost, HTTPS, or follow the panel instructions below.
help.voskMini: Vosk Mini voice dictation (~39 MB): light on CPU, low performance — clear articulation, no autocorrect. Prefer Whisper/Parakeet (GPU) for assisted speech.
help.voskMaxi: Vosk Maxi voice dictation (~41 MB): best browser-compatible Vosk recognition — clear articulation, no autocorrect. Prefer Whisper/Parakeet (GPU) for assisted speech.
help.whisper: {{name}} voice dictation ({{size}}): spoken autocorrect. {{backend}}. Segments ~{{seconds}} s.
help.parakeet: Parakeet voice dictation (~409 MB): strong spoken autocorrect. {{backend}}. Edit if needed before cleanup. If missing: cd install && bash restore-large-assets.sh
help.computeGpuLow: GPU ~{{vram}} GB — limited VRAM; GPU load may work but is risky, CPU fallback on failure.
help.computeTitle: CPU (WASM) or GPU (WebGPU) for Whisper and Parakeet
help.computeNoWebgpuInsecure: WebGPU unavailable over HTTP — use localhost or HTTPS to enable GPU.
help.computeNoWebgpuBrowser: This browser does not expose WebGPU — CPU only.
help.computeNoWebgpuAdapter: No WebGPU adapter found (driver or browser flags) — CPU only.
help.computeGpuReady: GPU ~{{vram}} GB — choose CPU or GPU.
help.computeGpuUnknownVram: WebGPU GPU detected — choose CPU or GPU (VRAM not estimated).
help.computeNoWebgpuFirefox: Firefox: WebGPU missing or disabled. Use Firefox ≥ 141 (Windows) or Nightly (Linux). about:config → dom.webgpu.enabled=true; if needed gfx.webgpu.ignore-blocklist=true. Or use Chrome/Edge for GPU.
help.computeNoWebgpuFirefoxAdapter: Firefox: WebGPU API on but no GPU adapter (blocklist or driver). about:config → gfx.webgpu.ignore-blocklist=true; check about:support (Graphics); on Linux try Firefox Nightly; or Chrome/Edge.
help.computeNoWebgpuChromeLinux: Chrome (Linux): no WebGPU adapter in the page (chrome://gpu may still show Available). chrome://settings/system → hardware acceleration ON; chrome://flags → Vulkan + ignore GPU blocklist; local desktop (not RDP/VNC); F12: navigator.gpu.requestAdapter().then(console.log).
help.computeNoWebgpuChrome: Chrome: no WebGPU adapter. chrome://gpu; update GPU driver; chrome://flags → ignore GPU blocklist if needed.
help.computeNoShaderF16: GPU lacks shader-f16 (WGSL f16) extension — Whisper WebGPU unavailable on this driver (common on GTX 1060 / ANGLE). CPU only.
help.computeGpuCompat: GPU without shader-f16 — WebGPU compat mode (fp32 q4): slower than fast GPU, but faster than CPU.
help.computeGpuVramMini: ~{{mini}} GB VRAM recommended for Whisper Mini on GPU.
help.computeGpuVramMaxi: ~{{maxi}} GB VRAM recommended for Whisper Maxi and Parakeet on GPU.
help.computeGpuVramLowMini: VRAM ~{{vram}} GB < {{mini}} GB recommended — Whisper Mini on GPU may fail; CPU fallback possible.
help.computeGpuVramLowMaxi: VRAM ~{{vram}} GB < {{maxi}} GB recommended — Whisper Maxi / Parakeet on GPU may fail; try CPU or a lighter model.
help.computeGpuVramBelow1: VRAM ~{{vram}} GB: Whisper Mini typically won't load on GPU (< 1 GB) — CPU recommended.
help.voskMaxiLangUnavailable: Vosk Maxi — voice dictation in {{lang}} unavailable. Use French, English (US), or Vosk Mini.
help.engineLangUnavailable: {{lang}} voice dictation model not installed — cannot load. After clone: cd install && bash restore-large-assets.sh

prompts.systemToggleTitle: Enable or disable the system prompt during cleaning
prompts.systemPromptPlaceholder:
You are a Prompt Cleaner / Reformulator.

UNIQUE ROLE: take the user's prompt and restate it in correct, clear, fluent English. You do NOTHING else.

RULES:
1. REFORMULATE word for word the original intent, in correct English (spelling, grammar, syntax, punctuation).
2. NEVER interpret, execute, analyze or answer the request.
3. NEVER ask the user questions.
4. NEVER ask for clarifications, context or examples.
5. NEVER add sections, structure or formatting that are not in the source text.
6. NEVER invent constraints, skills, roles or context not already implicit in the source text.
7. If essential information is absolutely indispensable and strictly deducible from the source text, replace with [to be specified] ONCE ONLY, in brackets, without comment.
8. Keep the same register (informal/formal) and tone as the source text.
9. Remove typos, repetitions, misused anglicisms and unnecessary colloquialisms, unless they are part of the intended style.
10. Preserve the logical order of ideas; you may reorder words or phrases for more natural English.
11. Output must be ONLY the reformulated text, with no preamble, conclusion, explanation or superfluous markdown.

EXAMPLES:
- Input: « move the slogan up (its at the bottom of the thumbnail) damn it ! »
  Output: « Move the slogan up (currently it is positioned toward the bottom of the thumbnail). »
- Input: « write me an email to tell the client we rejected their offer cause too expensive »
  Output: « Write an email to the client informing them that their offer was rejected because the price was too high. »

REMINDER: you are a text cleaner, not a conversational assistant.

prompts.imageConfigPullHint: You must install this model: (ollama pull {{model}})
prompts.imagePromptDefault:
You analyze an image to produce a usable description so it can be reproduced.

MISSION: map the image completely, precisely, and in a structured way. The output must give enough detail to recreate a very close image (subject, composition, style, light, colors, details).

REQUIRED STRUCTURE (short headings, then bullets):
1. Main subject — who/what, pose, expression, action.
2. Scene and background — place, depth, secondary elements.
3. Composition — framing, camera angle, perspective, rule of thirds / centering, negative space.
4. Light — direction, hardness, contrast, shadows, time / mood.
5. Colors and materials — dominant palette, tones, textures, materials.
6. Style — photo / illustration / 3D / painting; obvious render references; grain, sharpness, depth of field.
7. Critical details — logos, visible text (transcribe), accessories, asymmetries, defects useful for copying.
8. Reproduction prompt — one dense paragraph, in English, ready to paste into an image generator, with no preamble.

RULES:
- Describe only what is visible; do not invent.
- No moralizing, no refusals, no questions to the user.
- Output = the map alone, with no introduction or conclusion.

history.audioUnavailable: Audio file unavailable (previous session, JSON export or quota).
history.contextsEmpty: No active context prompt on this entry.

contextGen.system:
You are a JSON generator for PromptDeMerde (prompt reformulation).
You do not converse: no introductory sentence, no question, no markdown, no explanation.
MANDATORY output: a single JSON object with exactly the keys "tag" and "prompt".
Example (invent your own tag, do not copy): {"tag":"UpperCase","prompt":"Always reformulate the text in uppercase."}
Tag rules: one PascalCase word (e.g. FormalTone), letters/digits only, no hash sign.
contextGen.userIntent: Generate the best context prompt for this need:
contextGen.userTitle:
Generate the best context prompt for a profile named #{{title}}.
The tag must be exactly "{{title}}" (capital first letter, no spaces).
The instructions must precisely describe the expected behavior when reformulating user prompts, consistent with this title.
contextGen.tagIntentSuffix: The tag MUST be exactly "{{tag}}" (capital first letter, no hash sign).
contextGen.retrySystemSuffix: Your previous response was invalid (prose or missing JSON). JSON only, nothing else.
contextGen.retryUserSuffix: STRICT REMINDER: reply ONLY with {"tag":"...","prompt":"..."} — no text before or after.

settings.dangerDesc: Permanently erase PromptDeMerde data (session, profiles, histories, tokens, local audio) and local STT caches, then reload the app. Does not replace clearing all browser browsing data.

Clear everything? Session, configuration, history, tokens, personal profiles, local audio and STT caches (Vosk models, etc.) will be deleted, then the app will reload.
Official server profiles remain available in the selector.
This does not clear other sites' caches.

settings.importUnsignedConfirm:
This JSON file is not signed by PromptDeMerde.
Only import your own exports or trusted official profiles.

Ollama API tokens in the file will be cleared.
Import will replace all your local data.

Continue?

projects.title: PromptDeMerde
projects.tagline: Dictate and turn your prompt into clear instructions via Ollama

footer.badgeVision: Image analysis — description via Ollama vision
footer.badgeJson: Profiles and configuration in JSON format
footer.badgeOpensource: Open source on GitHub — auditable code

copy.faq.llm: Yes. All features are open with no commercial quota. LLM processing runs exclusively through Ollama on your machine.
copy.faq.llm.cloud: No. This repository works with Ollama installed locally (ollama.ai). No cloud API key is required.
copy.faq.export: settings, prompts, history, Workspace draft, Ollama configuration, voice dictation
copy.faq.models: Ollama only (local models). Set the URL in Settings; choose the model in the Workspace.
copy.faq.stt: Speech-to-Text (secondary option): speech fills the Workspace — the text can be edited by hand before cleaning, as with copy-paste. Engines are 100% local. Vosk Mini (~39 MB): light, modest CPU. Vosk Maxi (~41 MB): best browser-compatible Vosk. Both without autocorrect. Whisper and Parakeet: stronger oral performance (autocorrect), GPU recommended. Parakeet alone: cd install && bash restore-large-assets.sh if needed (see README.md).
copy.settings.backup: prompts, LLM engine (Ollama), voice dictation, history
copy.legal.features: Local Ollama, unlimited context prompts, customizable system prompt, voice dictation (Vosk Maxi by default, Vosk Mini, Whisper Mini/Maxi and Parakeet optional), configuration export/import.
copy.legal.prereq: A working Ollama instance for prompt cleanup
copy.legal.output: Responses generated by your local Ollama model
copy.privacy.llm: Prompt processing runs through Ollama, installed on your machine or network. The file lib/proxy/ollama/olama.php provides a technical relay (CORS) to Ollama, without persisting transited content — prompts are not stored on the server after the request.
copy.privacy.backup: settings, prompts, history, Ollama configuration, voice dictation
copy.privacy.transit: During cleanup, your text, system prompt and active contexts are sent to your Ollama instance via lib/proxy/ollama/olama.php — in-memory transit only, no server-side retention
copy.privacy.atRest: The keys above remain in your browser. Only LLM cleanup sends the current text (and active instructions) to the proxy toward Ollama — without storing it on the server. No telemetry.
copy.privacy.guarantee: Product guarantee: no database, no PHP session, no telemetry, no application-level prompt writes to disk. Auditable open-source code. Self-hosting lets you fully control the infrastructure.
copy.privacy.stt: Prompt cleanup uses Ollama on your machine or network. Voice dictation embeds local models (Vosk, Whisper, Parakeet) with no cloud call for audio.

workspaceUi.llmTimeoutHint: Max duration before cutoff (connection and streaming)
workspaceUi.dictationStoppedForClean: Voice dictation stopped — cleaning current text.
workspaceUi.providerLater: This provider will be available later.
workspaceUi.errorGeneric: Unexpected error. Retry; if it persists, check Options → LLM and the browser console.
workspaceUi.imageImportImpossibleInference: Image import impossible — wait until cleaning finishes.
workspaceUi.imageImportImpossibleDictation: Image import impossible — stop voice dictation first.
workspaceUi.imageImportImpossibleAudioMode: Image import impossible — leave audio file mode first.
workspaceUi.imageInferenceWait: Cleaning in progress — wait until it finishes.
workspaceUi.imageDictationImportWait: Voice dictation in progress — stop it before importing an image.
workspaceUi.imageAudioModeWait: Leave audio mode before importing an image.
workspaceUi.imageUnsupported: Unsupported format (PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF). Pick another file.
workspaceUi.imageTooLarge: Image still too large after compression. Choose a lighter file.
workspaceUi.imageDecodeFail: File is not a readable image. Retry with PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
workspaceUi.imageVisionUnavailable: Vision requires Ollama. Select Ollama in Options → LLM.
workspaceUi.imageAnalyzeFail: Vision analysis failed (unknown cause). Check Ollama and Prompts → Image prompts.
workspaceUi.imageModelMissing: Model {{model}} not found in Ollama. Run ollama pull {{model}}, then check Prompts → Image prompts.
workspaceUi.imageEmptyResult: Ollama returned no text. Retry or change the model in Prompts → Image prompts.
workspaceUi.imageOllamaUnreachable: Ollama unreachable. Start Ollama, then check Options → LLM (URL / proxy).
workspaceUi.imageAnalyzeTimeout: Image analysis timed out. Retry or use a lighter model (Prompts → Image prompts).
workspaceUi.inferenceMetaDriftWarn: Output drifted from system instructions (meta / sniper). Reduce active contexts or compress tokens.
workspaceUi.inferenceMetaRetry: Meta drift detected — instructions not followed.

faq.title: Here are some answers to your messy questions.

items.a: A vague, ambiguous or incomplete prompt that produces mediocre LLM results. Examples: "write something about cats", "build me a website", "summarize this book".
Yes. All features are open with no commercial quota. LLM processing runs exclusively through Ollama on your machine.
Yes. PromptDeMerde is free, open source and designed to be self-hosted. All features are available without account or registration. Project by DreamProjectAI — code on GitHub.
Yes. Clone the GitHub repo, install PHP + Ollama on your server and import your profile ZIP archive. See README.md and technical documentation.

items.q: 👉 Do I need an account or API key?
items.a: No. This repository works with Ollama installed locally (ollama.ai). No cloud API key is required.

items.q: 👉 Is my data stored on your servers?
items.a: No. The application does not store any data on the server (no database, no account). Your settings, preferences and history stay in your browser's local storage. To back them up or transfer them, use Settings → JSON Profile → Export / Import. See the privacy policy.

items.q: 👉 How do I back up my configuration?
items.a: Via Settings → JSON profile → Export: you download a profile ZIP archive. Re-import that .zip on another browser or after reinstall — the full JSON lives inside the ZIP.

Yes. Settings → JSON profile → Export produces a ZIP archive ({profile}-promptdemerde-profile-v1.23.2.zip) with settings, prompts, history, Workspace draft, Ollama configuration, voice dictation — 43 pdm_* keys + prompts. Re-import via Import only (ZIP; standalone JSON is rejected).

items.q: 👉 How do I delete all my data?
items.a: Go to Settings and click "Clear all" in the danger zone. You can also clear site data via your browser settings.

No. In the Prompts tab, create as many context prompts as you want (up to 999), edit tag and text freely, activate several at once or none. The system prompt is also customizable. Each cleanup is saved in local history; everything can be backed up via JSON export. See technical documentation.

Speech-to-Text (secondary option): you speak, it fills the Workspace — you can edit the text by hand before cleanup. Engines are 100% local. Vosk Maxi (~41 MB) by default; Vosk Mini (~39 MB) lighter. Whisper and Parakeet: better for spoken input (autocorrect), GPU recommended. Parakeet: cd install && bash restore-large-assets.sh if needed (see README.md).
Ollama only (local models). Set the URL in Settings; choose the model in the Workspace.

cta.title: Your loser prompts have lasted long enough!
cta.subtitle: 100% free. Open source. Keep your tokens.

proof.title: Ultra-precise statistics that are complete bullshit.

demoPairs.before: Write me an article about dogs
demoPairs.after: Write a 600-word article on the 5 dog breeds best suited to apartment living, covering for each: temperament, exercise needs, health constraints. Casual but informative tone, audience: city dwellers without a garden.

demoPairs.before: Build a website for my restaurant
demoPairs.after: Design a homepage for a Provençal restaurant in Lyon: hero with photo, weekly updated daily menu, online booking section, integrated Google reviews, directions. Warm color palette, mobile-first responsive.

Provide a structured summary of George Orwell's 1984 in 3 parts: work and author context, detailed act-by-act summary (15 chapters), thematic analysis (totalitarianism, language, surveillance). 800 words, academic tone, prep-student audience.

demoPairs.before: Give me a diet to lose weight
demoPairs.after: Propose a 1600 kcal/day hypocaloric meal plan for 7 days for a sedentary 35-year-old woman aiming to lose 5 kg. 3 meals + 2 snacks, portions in grams, exclude tree nuts (allergy). Neutral tone, table format.

demoPairs.before: Write an email saying I'm resigning
demoPairs.after: Draft a formal resignation email to my manager with: clear subject, effective date (1-month notice), request for meeting, thanks for the past 3 years. Professional yet warm tone, signature with contact details.

demoPairs.before: Create a lesson plan on the French Revolution
demoPairs.after: Draft a 2-hour lesson plan for grade 8 on causes of the French Revolution: 10-min interactive intro, 3 thematic parts (economic crisis, social inequality, Enlightenment), document activity, conclusion. Specific learning objectives.

Explain the French tax system to a micro-entrepreneur: income tax vs corporate tax, social contributions, VAT thresholds, possible deductions, 2025 deadlines. Q&A format, accessible tone, numeric examples.

demoPairs.before: Write an ad to sell my car
demoPairs.after: Write a sale ad for a 2020 Peugeot 208 GT Line, 45,000 km, blue, panoramic roof option. Structure: hook, main equipment, general condition, service history, justified price €14,500, contact details. Enthusiastic but honest C2C tone.

Create an 8-week fitness program for a sedentary 45-year-old man, 3 sessions/week, no equipment (home). Each session: warm-up, exercises with reps, recovery. Progressive load, associated nutrition tips.

demoPairs.before: Write a speech for my sister's wedding
demoPairs.after: Write a 5-minute wedding speech for my sister, mixing emotion and humor: funny childhood anecdote, praise of the couple, wishes for the future. Avoid clichés, balance tenderness and self-deprecation, mixed family audience.

Propose a one-month Instagram editorial calendar (4 weeks, 3 posts/week) for an artisan bakery in Bordeaux. For each post: type (carousel, reel, story), topic, caption with hashtags, publish time. Goal: +30% engagement.

demoPairs.before: Write a summary of the film Interstellar
demoPairs.after: Summarize Christopher Nolan's Interstellar (2014) in 500 words: chronological synopsis, scientific concepts (black hole, time dilation, 5th dimension), themes (transcendent love, humanity's survival). Cinephile tone, spoilers included, audience who hasn't seen it.

demoPairs.before: Write a cover letter for a developer job
demoPairs.after: Write a cover letter for a full-stack React/Node.js developer role at a Paris fintech startup: personalized hook, 3 key experiences with metrics, fit with job technologies, related personal project. Confident tone, 350 words max.

demoPairs.before: Help me write a marketing CV
demoPairs.after: Structure a modern CV for a digital marketing profile with 5 years' experience: professional headline, reverse-chronological roles with KPIs, technical skills (SEO, Google Ads, Mailchimp), training, certifications. ATS-compatible format, clean design.

demoPairs.before: Suggest a Christmas menu for 10 people
demoPairs.after: Compose a festive Christmas menu for 10: starter, main, cheese, dessert — cocktail appetizers, butternut soup, roast capon with chestnuts, aged cheese board, hazelnut chocolate log. Specify quantities, prep time, paired wines.

Versions

Maquette de vidéo générée automatiquement par un second script interne au projet — qualité préliminaire, le script sera amélioré pour produire de futures versions.

Still nauseated by your own prompts?

Normal! 90% of prompts you send to LLMs are toxic waste. Result: generic, sloppy, or completely off-target answers.

"Build me a website" — what type? what design? what goal?
"Write something marketing" — for whom? which product? which channel?
"Code something in Python" — which function? which libs? which format?

A sniper prompt in just 3 steps.



DETECT

X-ray your mess and locate the holes: vague intent, missing context, unspecified format.

⚡

TRANSFORM

Inject the constraints you always skip in your crap: tone, length, structure, audience, sources.



SNIPERISE

Rephrase your mess into a precise, surgical prompt ready to paste into your LLM.

TRY NOW →

Here are some answers to your messy questions.

👉 What is a "messy prompt"?
A vague, ambiguous or incomplete prompt that produces mediocre LLM results. Examples: "write something about cats", "build me a website", "summarize this book".
👉 Is it really free?
Yes. All features are open with no commercial quota. LLM processing runs exclusively through Ollama on your machine.
👉 Is the project open source?
Yes. PromptDeMerde is free, open source and designed to be self-hosted. All features are available without account or registration. Project by DreamProjectAI — code on GitHub.
👉 Can I self-host?
Yes. Clone the GitHub repo, install PHP + Ollama on your server and import your profile ZIP archive. See README.md and technical documentation.
👉 Do I need an account or API key?
No. This repository works with Ollama installed locally (ollama.ai). No cloud API key is required.
👉 Is my data stored on your servers?
No. The application does not store any data on the server (no database, no account). Your settings, preferences and history stay in your browser's local storage. To back them up or transfer them, use Settings → JSON Profile → Export / Import. See the privacy policy.
👉 How do I back up my configuration?
Via Settings → JSON profile → Export: you download a profile ZIP archive. Re-import that .zip on another browser or after reinstall — the full JSON lives inside the ZIP.
👉 Can I export my data?
Yes. Settings → JSON profile → Export produces a ZIP archive ({profile}-promptdemerde-profile-v1.23.2.zip) with settings, prompts, history, Workspace draft, Ollama configuration, voice dictation — 43 pdm_* keys + prompts. Re-import via Import only (ZIP; standalone JSON is rejected).
👉 How do I delete all my data?
Go to Settings and click "Clear all" in the danger zone. You can also clear site data via your browser settings.
👉 Are context prompts locked?
No. In the Prompts tab, create as many context prompts as you want (up to 999), edit tag and text freely, activate several at once or none. The system prompt is also customizable. Each cleanup is saved in local history; everything can be backed up via JSON export. See technical documentation.
👉 What is STT?
Speech-to-Text (secondary option): you speak, it fills the Workspace — you can edit the text by hand before cleanup. Engines are 100% local. Vosk Maxi (~41 MB) by default; Vosk Mini (~39 MB) lighter. Whisper and Parakeet: better for spoken input (autocorrect), GPU recommended. Parakeet: cd install && bash restore-large-assets.sh if needed (see README.md).
👉 Which LLM providers are supported?
Ollama only (local models). Set the URL in Settings; choose the model in the Workspace.
